name: SCN-003 | Phishing → Payload → Persistence
description: Simulates a phishing-initiated compromise. Phase 1 (GoPhish email delivery) is narrated in the SE runbook — demo starts post-click with the CALDERA agent already running. Phase 2 establishes dual persistence: a scheduled task disguised as MicrosoftEdgeUpdateTaskMachineCore (T1053.005) and a registry Run key disguised as OneDriveSync (T1547.001). Demonstrates attacker redundancy — two persistence mechanisms so one survives detection and removal.
